assets.abstract: There is a substantial knowledge gap in the narcissism literature: <1 % of the nearly 12,000 articles on narcissism have addressed its neural basis. To help fill this gap, we asked whether the multifacetedness of narcissism could be decoded from spontaneous neural oscillations. We attempted to do so by applying a machine learning approach (multivariate pattern analysis) to the resting-state EEG data of 162 participants who also completed a comprehensive battery of narcissism scales assessing age

phase_mapping.bridge_rationale: Wind and pride — ego, narcissism, social dominance, self-esteem, status, social hierarchy in neuroscience, self-enhancement, hubris.
